## Goal
Describe the feature or deliverable at a high level.

## Design
Explain how this will work technically.
Include architecture, key classes/modules, and approach.

## Scope
- [ ] Major component 1
- [ ] Major component 2
- [ ] Major component 3

## Sub-Issues
List planned sub-issues (link them as they are created):
- [ ] #<id> Task name
- [ ] #<id> Task name

## Notes
Any additional context, risks, or dependencies.
